overview.name: Auth JWT Variations
overview.description:
This scenario verifies JWT authentication flow using variation data.
Test flow includes: 1. Load variation data from CSV file. 2. Authenticate via auth tag using JWT login flow. 3. Create protected resource using variation value. 4. Verify create response = 200. 5. Retrieve all protected resources. 6. Verify that created variation resource exists. 7. Reset JWT auth state after each variation execution.
This scenario validates: - Variation value injection into authenticated requests - JWT auth flow wrapped by auth tag - Protected resource creation using variation data - Retrieval of created resources - Stable repeated auth execution with multiple variation rows

http.comment: Create protected resource using variation value
Reset JWT auth state after variation
